name: Osteria delle Corti
content:
I had dinner here once before a gala dinner, and I absolutely needed the extra food. I went here with a Ukrainian guy from North Carolina I met at an aerospace conference, and we shared a single Lime scooter on the way here It was his idea to share the scooter, but I later found out he had a girlfriend.. It is in a quieter block, tucked away on a residential street in the otherwise busy city center. I can’t remember who picked out the place, but I do remember it being really good, especially the Risotto alla Milanese that I had (listed as La Tradizione on the menu). I would recommend going there.
I have no clue how I managed to find the name of the place—I went there years ago, had no clue what the name was, a vague idea of the general direction we travelled to get there, and a distinct memory that the terrace cover was maroon. It took me about fifteen minutes of clicking around on Google maps with a mix of satellite and street view without much hope that I would be able to find it, but to my surprise, I still managed to find it.
